summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatEmbed AI Phase A: Conversation History & Export features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed (100%). Features tested: conversation list with pagination, conversation detail dialog, CSV export, search/filter functionality, always-visible usage bar on dashboard, and sidebar navigation.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: GET /api/conversations requires authentication (401 on unauthenticated)
GET /api/conversations returns paginated data with conversations, total, page, pages
GET /api/conversations returns correct conversation structure (session_id, chatbot_id, chatbot_name, first_message, message_count, user_message_count, first_message_at, last_message_at)
GET /api/conversations?chatbot_id={id} filters by chatbot
GET /api/conversations?search={term} filters by content
GET /api/conversations?date_from={date}&date_to={date} filters by date range
GET /api/conversations?page={n}&limit={n} respects pagination parameters
GET /api/conversations/{session_id} requires authentication (401 on unauthenticated)
GET /api/conversations/{session_id} returns 404 for non-existent session
GET /api/conversations/{session_id} returns full conversation thread with messages
GET /api/conversations/export requires authentication (401 on unauthenticated)
GET /api/conversations/export returns CSV with Content-Type: text/csv
GET /api/conversations/export has Content-Disposition header with filename
GET /api/conversations/export CSV has correct columns (session_id, chatbot_name, role, message, timestamp)
GET /api/conversations/export supports chatbot_id and date filters
POST /api/maintenance/cleanup-expired requires authentication (401 on unauthenticated)
POST /api/maintenance/cleanup-expired returns ok:true and deleted_count
Integration: List conversations then view detail flow works correctly
Frontend: Dashboard shows always-visible usage bar with data-testid='usage-bar'
Frontend: Sidebar has Conversations link with data-testid='nav-conversations'
Frontend: /dashboard/conversations page loads with data-testid='conversations-page'
Frontend: Conversations page has title 'Konversationen' (German)
Frontend: Search input present with data-testid='search-input'
Frontend: Filter toggle button present with data-testid='toggle-filters-btn'
Frontend: Export CSV button present with data-testid='export-csv-btn'
Frontend: Conversation list shows 3 seeded conversations
Frontend: Clicking conversation opens detail dialog with data-testid='conversation-dialog'
Frontend: Dialog shows conversation thread with data-testid='conversation-thread'
Frontend: Dialog shows message list with data-testid='message-list'
Frontend: Filter panel opens with chatbot dropdown and date range filters
Frontend: CSV export downloads file with correct filename format (conversations-YYYY-MM-DD.csv)
Frontend: Downloaded CSV contains all 12 seeded messages across 3 sessions
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding DialogDescription component
seed_data_creation: 12 test messages pre-seeded across 3 sessions (test_session_001, test_session_002, test_session_003) for the test chatbot
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Conversation History & Export features are fully implemented and working. All conversation endpoints (list, detail, export, cleanup) are functional. The conversations page is in German by default. 12 test messages exist across 3 sessions for testing. Email sending remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.email_delivery: Email sending is mocked - tokens returned in API responses for demo/testing
mocked_apis.conversation_apis: All conversation APIs use real MongoDB data - NOT mocked

sidebar_navigation.description: Conversations link present in sidebar with MessageSquare icon
